ddls:
CREATE TABLE "circuit_boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the circuit board */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuit_boards_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuit_boards_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the designer (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the designer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the designer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component category */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for procurement of the component */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES component_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the component category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_attributes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pad" (
  "pad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pad */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "pad_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the pad */,
  "pad_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the pad */,
  "pad_w" REAL /* Width of the pad */,
  "pad_h" REAL /* Height of the pad */,
  "pad_rotation" REAL /* Rotation of the pad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pad_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pad_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "component_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first component */,
  "component_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second component */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., series, parallel) */,
  "connection_length" REAL /* Length of the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_connections_component_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id1") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_connections_component_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("component_id2") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_connections_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_flow" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "signal_input" REAL /* Input signal value */,
  "signal_output" REAL /* Output signal value */,
  "signal_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the signal */,
  "signal_amplitude" REAL /* Amplitude of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_flow_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_flow_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_performance" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the temperature */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_performance_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_performance_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the designer (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of collaboration */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revision_history" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revision_author" TEXT /* Author of the revision */,
  "revision_comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_history_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES circuit_boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "board_project" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit board */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_supplier_component" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id", "component_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each circuit board
Contact phone number of the manufacturer
Role of the designer (e.g., engineer, manager)
Years of experience of the designer
Relevant certifications held by the designer
Lead time for procurement of the component
Available stock quantity of the component

Role of the designer (e.g., owner, contributor)
